detailed_description: This video is a time-lapse showcasing the progressive growth of a man's beard over 60 days. It features a series of close-up shots of his face, beginning with a very short, sparse beard or stubble and evolving into a noticeably fuller and denser facial hair. The on-screen text '60 DIAS DE CRESCIMENTO' (60 DAYS OF GROWTH) explicitly highlights the transformation, making the entire sequence a clear demonstration of a growth process and its visual results.

segments.why_kept: The entire video serves as the semantic core, demonstrating the 'Reveal/Result' of beard growth over 60 days. It directly fulfills the purpose indicated by the on-screen text '60 DIAS DE CRESCIMENTO' through a clear visual transformation. No trimming was necessary as the 'No-Mistake Rule' applies, with the action starting and ending precisely with the video's duration.
